message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Damaged and Late Delivery – Order #[Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction regarding the status of my recent order, #[Order Number], which was placed on [Date of Purchase].

According to the shipping confirmation provided, the estimated delivery date was [Original Estimated Delivery Date]. However, the package did not arrive until [Actual Delivery Date], resulting in a delay of two weeks. This significant delay has caused considerable inconvenience, as I required the items for [briefly mention reason, e.g., a specific event, gift, or urgent project].

Furthermore, upon receiving the package, I discovered that the contents were severely damaged. Specifically, [describe the damage in detail, e.g., the box was crushed, the item inside was cracked, or the packaging was torn open]. I have attached photographs of the damaged packaging and the items themselves for your reference.

Given that the product arrived both late and in a damaged condition, I am requesting a full refund of the purchase price, including shipping costs. Alternatively, if a replacement is available, I would prefer an expedited shipment at no additional cost, ensuring it arrives within [number] business days.

I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] for [length of time], and I expect a higher standard of service and care in handling my orders. I trust that you will address this matter promptly and provide a resolution by [Date, e.g., end of business day on Friday, October 27th].

Please let me know the next steps for returning the damaged items. I look forward to your swift response.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Address]
[Order Number]

**Attachments:**
1. Photo of damaged packaging
2. Photo of damaged
